name: Al's Chocolate to the Max.
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the first four ingredients in a microwave-safe bowl.
2. Microwave the whipping cream until just beginning to boil.
3. Add the hot cream and blend everything until well combined.
4. Pour into small sherbet or wine glasses (use disposable plastic ones).
5. Refrigerate for several hours.
This is chocolate to the MAX! Few people refuse one of these, and few can eat more than one.
